name: Apricot Oatcake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup dried fruit (chopped apricots and sultanas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together until well combined.
2. Shape the mixture into small cookies.
3. Place the cookies on a greased baking sheet, spacing them evenly apart.
4. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown and crisp.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
6. Store the cooled oatcakes in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
7. These cookies can be stored in the fridge for up to 3 days and remain crispy.
